ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of the package (e.g., library, framework) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the package was first added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the package was last updated */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL to the package's source repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that depends on another package */,
  "parent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., import, inherits) */,
  "version_range" TEXT /* Version range of the dependency */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dependency is optional */,
  "dependency_description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_parent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that imports another package */,
  "imported_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being imported */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of import (e.g., function, class) */,
  "imported_version" TEXT /* Version of the imported package */,
  "import_context" TEXT /* Context in which the import is used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_imported_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("imported_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that uses the method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of method (e.g., function, procedure) */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Return type of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that uses the class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of class (e.g., data structure, algorithm) */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "extends" TEXT /* Specifies if the class extends another class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heaviness" (
  "heaviness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heaviness metric */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being measured */,
  "heaviness_score" REAL /* Heaviness score of the package */,
  "heaviness_type" TEXT /* Type of heaviness metric (e.g., size, complexity) */,
  "metric_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the heaviness metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heaviness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heaviness_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, administrator) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage metric */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the package */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., import, execution) */,
  "usage_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of usage */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Development environment in which the package was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_usage_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
